notes: Dedicated DM Standards volume with full quantitative tables (car parking Table 6.4, bicycle Table 6.5, EV Table 6.6, X/Y sightline Tables 6.1/6.2, private open space 48/60/75 sqm, 22m separation, 15% public open space). Residential density is deferred to per-settlement plans in Volume 2; rural one-off minimum site area is not a numeric standard here (governed by the Rural Housing Design Guideline + EPA wastewater CoP).
